allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add project documentation and standards

- Add CLAUDE.md with comprehensive development guide
- Add CHANGELOG.md to track refactoring progress
- Add COMPONENT_SPEC.md with component standards

These documents establish the foundation for upcoming
refactoring work and automation tools \(3 Skills\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(pa/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add quick start guide for future sessions

- Create QUICK_START.md for rapid onboarding
- Include essential commands and workflow
- Add common pitfalls and best practices
- Reference all key documentation files

This provides a fast entry point for Claude Code sessions
without needing to read all documentation upfront.

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(pa/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add project summary and high-level overview

- Create PROJECT_SUMMARY.md with vision and roadmap
- Document current state and success metrics
- Explain architecture decisions and philosophy
- Provide learning outcomes and key file references

This serves as the "30,000 foot view" for understanding
the project''s goals, current state, and future direction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(pa/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
